roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ATC VACATE SENTENCE ISS'D 052014; MOT ISSUE NEW SENTENCE FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR RE MOTION TO RE-SENTENCE FILED

/CAL:DEF ADD TO CALENDAR RE VACATE OF SENTENCE/X:MOTION TO VACATE SENTENCEOF 5-20-14 IS GRANTED,/X:COURT ISSUES THE FOLLOWING NEW SENTENCE:/3000REIN/PAJ:84 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 42 DAYS/4019HALF/X:COURTFINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 1-3-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S MOTION TO VACATE THE PREVIOUSSENTENCE OF 03-18-14, IS GRANTED,  THE COURT IMPOSES THE NEW SENTENCE AS FOLLOWS:/3000REIN/PAJ:180 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  90  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 01-03-14,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:02-06-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITHTREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:84 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  41  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MUST ENTER AND COMPLETEA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AS A CONDITION OF PAROLE,  THIS PLACEMENT WILL BE HANDLED BY THE FELONY COURT WHERE THE FELONY WAS SETTLED,  IF A PROGRAM CANNOT BE FOUND TO MEET THE CLIENT'S NEEDS, THEN CLIENT WILL SERVE THEONE YEAR JAIL SENTENCE IN THE COUNTY JAIL,/X:PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 01-03-14,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 02-06-14 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X:THE PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/X:THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR STATUSOF FELONY,/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR STATUS OF FELONY,/
